data.title: Data
data.clearConfirm: This will delete all your health data from this device. You can re-import at any time.

about.title: About
about.legal: This app processes data you exported from Oura's official portal under GDPR Article 20. It is not affiliated with Oura Health.
about.privacy: No data ever leaves your device. We have no server, no database, and no analytics.
